MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Jane Creason, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff All Hallows Preservation L.P., represented by agent: Keala O'Sulllivan Lum.
Jaime Rush, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant):Susan Marchall.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
TRIAL DATE VACATED.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Continued To Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Attorney, Ivy P. Tseng, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Susan Marshall, is present.
Attorney, Mark Epstein, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.
